description: The repo-audit skill's 8-analyst orchestration: each layer analyst receives a Repomix XML slice path and returns a JSON layer object; the orchestrator merges them into the final audit report.

members.role: runtime layer (language, version, package manager, Docker)
framework layer (primary framework, rendering, API style, routing)
database layer (DB type, ORM/client, migrations, schema patterns)
testing layer (framework, coverage tooling, test types, naming)
CI/CD layer (pipeline tool, stages, deployment targets)
AI/LLM layer (models, providers, prompting, eval strategy)
Claude Code config layer (CLAUDE.md, skills, agents, hooks, MCP)

handoff_contract: each member receives an XML slice path and returns a JSON layer object; the orchestrator merges member outputs into docs/audits/<owner>-<repo>-<date>.json and .md without re-deriving any layer itself
